speaker: speaker1
text: Excuse me , can you tell me the name of the book you read ?

speaker: speaker1
text: Harry Potter ? Is that book funny ?

speaker: speaker2
text: Actually , the language itself is not so funny , but you can imagine the scene , that's funny .

speaker: speaker2
text: Have you ever read this book before ?

speaker: speaker1
text: No , but my little brother likes it very much .

speaker: speaker2
text: It's really a good book . You will like it too .

speaker: speaker1
text: I'll try to read it . Actually , I like literature very much .

speaker: speaker2
text: Wow , that sounds like a scholar . By the way , who's your favorite writer ?

speaker: speaker2
text: Me too . Pride and Prejudice is my favorite .

speaker: speaker1
text: I like it too . But Sense and Sensibility is my favorite .
